# Ideal Visualizations
> Architectural 3D visualization studio based in Amritsar, Punjab, India. Photorealistic exterior & interior rendering, animated walkthroughs, 360° tours, elevation design, architecture planning and turnkey construction. Founded by Danish. Serving Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Dubai, Chandigarh, Amritsar and 10+ other cities across India and the UAE.

## Canonical pages
- [Home](https://ideal-visualizations.vercel.app/): services overview, founder bio, portfolio highlights, locations, contact
- [Gallery](https://ideal-visualizations.vercel.app/gallery): full archive of photoreal renders and cinematic walkthroughs

## Services
- Exterior 3D Rendering — photoreal exterior visualizations
- Interior 3D Rendering — cinematic interior renderings
- Architectural Walkthroughs — animated cinematic walkthroughs
- 360° Views / Virtual Tours — interactive panoramas for web & VR
- Architecture Planning — site-tailored architectural plans
- Elevation Designing — façade and elevation design
- Interior Designing — material, layout & styling
- Turnkey Construction Projects — concept-to-handover execution
- Photoshop Rendered Plans — marketing-ready 2D plans

## Service area
Amritsar (HQ), Chandigarh, Mohali, Jalandhar, Ludhiana, Bathinda, Manali, Shimla, Delhi, Noida, Gurgaon, Mumbai, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Kolkata, Pune, Dubai.
